brief: Trump escalates trade and military tensions with Canada and Iran, while domestic politics sees progressive rallies and a lieutenant governor's exit. Research highlights second-language writing dynamics and AI's role in education and safety.
news_summary: U.S. strikes hit Iran for a seventh night, Trump threatens Canada with tariffs over wildfire smoke, and a Memphis rally supports a progressive Democrat after fatal shootings. Other notable events include a boat tragedy off San Francisco and an outbreak of Legionnaires' disease in New York City.
papers_summary: Studies explore biographical factors shaping L2 writing teachers' identities, multimodal meaning-making in children's writing, and ChatGPT's effects on rhetorical moves in personal statements. Technical papers examine AI safety in setup instructions and human-robot juggling.

en.brief: Trump escalates trade and military tensions with Canada and Iran, while domestic politics sees progressive rallies and a lieutenant governor's exit. Research highlights second-language writing dynamics and AI's role in education and safety.
en.news_summary: U.S. strikes hit Iran for a seventh night, Trump threatens Canada with tariffs over wildfire smoke, and a Memphis rally supports a progressive Democrat after fatal shootings. Other notable events include a boat tragedy off San Francisco and an outbreak of Legionnaires' disease in New York City.
en.papers_summary: Studies explore biographical factors shaping L2 writing teachers' identities, multimodal meaning-making in children's writing, and ChatGPT's effects on rhetorical moves in personal statements. Technical papers examine AI safety in setup instructions and human-robot juggling.

zh.brief: 今日重點新聞包括貝安德就任英國工黨黨魁，中英關係或迎來新篇章；習近平首次出席世界AI大會，強調開源戰略；香港國安法下禁書清單持續擴大。學術研究方面，英文論文聚焦二語寫作與AI輔助寫作工具。
zh.news_summary: 貝安德成為英國首相熱門人選，其對華政策引發關注；習近平現身AI大會，凸顯中國開源AI戰略；香港持續出現書籍被下架與檢走現象。
zh.papers_summary: 英文研究探討了二語寫作教師的專業身份與教學實踐，以及ChatGPT對個人陳述寫作的影響。

todays_image.caption: Just as a lifeboat symbolizes rescue from danger, the deployment of seven Americans to a disputed Ebola site under a new travel ban suggests a paradoxical intention to both contain and confront a biological threat.
todays_image.title: Lifeboat
